title: No Elytra in Combat
description: Disables Elytras while players are in PvP Combat
body:
Elytras are extremely useful, however they make PvP really boring, as other players can just quickly run away during combat.

This datapack disables elytras when a player is hit or hits another player.

Players have to be out of combat for 45s before their elytra can fly again
